caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters sits at a desk in a studio. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring the "UNICORN HUSTLE" logo and gold stars. A professional microphone on a boom arm is situated directly in front of him. In the background, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, there is a black container with a red label that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". The man is speaking and gesturing with his hands; in the beginning, his hands are clasped together on the desk, but as the sequence progresses, he raises his right hand to gesture emphatically. He wears a gold watch on his left wrist. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body and facial expressions as he talks.
